message:
refactor(ufunc): route array construction through typed storage bridge

Replace six direct Self { shape, values, dtype } struct literals in
UFuncArray with calls to Self::from_values_with_dtype_lossy() or
Self::from_values_with_dtype(). Affected methods: tril, triu, diag
(both 1D→2D and 2D→1D paths), eye, and tri. Ensures all typed array
construction flows through the ArrayStorage bridge APIs introduced in
bc93d31, centralizing dtype normalization and validation logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
